description: An OBSERVATIONAL MIRROR record of a real government unit in the world government atlas (ADR-2606021600). CONSTITUTIONAL (G3, §2(c)): this record MIRRORS a real public body — it NEVER claims to BE the government, is NEVER an official channel, and issues/accepts NOTHING on a government's behalf. `atlasDid` (did:web:etzhayyim.com:gov:<iso3>:...) is the etzhayyim mirror identifier; `officialDid`/`officialUrl` point at the body itself. Non-fabrication (G5): `sourcing` + `provenance` + `lastVerified` mandatory; `representative` rows are illustrative, never counted as coverage. Projection of the :gov.unit/* kotoba vocabulary.

atlasDid.description: etzhayyim civic-atlas MIRROR DID — observational, NEVER claims to be the gov (G3)

officialDid.description: the government's OWN DID if it publishes one (mirrored, never minted by us)

parentId.description: unitId of the parent node (absent for supranational / top country)

externalCode.description: prefixed reconciliation keys, e.g. jp-jichitai:131041 / iso3166-2:JP-13

organismRef.description: :organism/id (engi) for the tsumugi 縁/取 power-graph reconciliation

geo.description: IPFS CID of GeoJSON boundary OR 'lat,lon' centroid

sourcing.description: G5 — representative NEVER counted as coverage
